chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-390 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A No.2267/2019 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on M.A No.2268/2019 4. For orders on M.A No.2269/2019 5. For hearing of main case 04.03.2019. Mr. Abdul Shakoor Keerio, advocate for petitioner *** 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. Petitioner has filed this petition seeking direction to respondent No.1 Secretary Revenue Government of Sindh Shahbaz Building, Hyderabad to initiate an enquiry against private respondents No.9 & 10 namely Wahid Bux Umrani & Muhammad Nadeem for launching a housing scheme with the name and style of Bismillah Housing Scheme, New Saeedabad District Matiari unlawfully on the government land. The annexures annexed with the petition by the petitioner do not identify any government land or its encroachment by said respondents. It is also not clear either why the petitioner has not approached the relevant government authority for vacating the government land, if any, from said private respondents. Learned counsel has not been able to justify that as to why petitioner has not approached Anti- Encroachment Tribunal against the said respondents. In these circumstances, we are of the view that this petition is not maintainable and accordingly same is dismissed in limine alongwith listed applications. Petitioner, however, is at liberty to avail his remedy, if any, before the appropriate forum in accordance with law. JUDGE JUDGE Sajjad Ali Jessar
